title: Slime Detector
description: This mod adds a simple vanilla slime chunk finder, as an item.
body:
Slime Detector is a simple, vanilla-friendly utility mod designed to take the guesswork out of finding Slime Chunks!

This mod introduces a single, easily craftable item: the Slime Detector. It will instantly tell you if you are currently standing in a Slime Chunk. The mod also adds crafting for the slime ball itself.

It's a clean, simple, and intuitive addition to your game—no complex UIs or overwhelming mechanics. Just a quick way to find the bounce!

![Slime Detector craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f39a5e7d6c4eb849173740cb9e857d56cdda61d5.png)
![Slime Ball craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29f34d098b2acd8d6bc93fa9bd81db259fb9c315.png)
